architecture: raw onnxruntime, arena off, prepacking off, 1 thread; rerank max_len 256 micro_batch 5; faiss loaded from file

steps.label: 2. + ONNX embedder AND reranker sessions loaded
4. + FAISS index 50000 x 384 read from disk (prod boot)

6. after 25-query burst through full hybrid path
